_comment: AGSIST Grower Pulse — single source of truth for the homepage poll. To run a new week: move the current block into archive (with its final results+total pulled from the Worker), then write the new question into current with a new id. Stage 2 automation will do this on a schedule.

current.question: How's soil moisture on your farm right now?

archive.question: How do your crops look right now compared to a normal year?
